description: You are a clinical neuropsychologist at a memory clinic digitizing the episodic memory subscale of the Addenbrooke's Cognitive Examination III (ACE-III) for tablet-based administration. Using PsychoPy Builder, create an experiment that implements the three-word registration and delayed recall procedure. The experiment must include a learning phase presenting the target words (Lemon, Key, Ball) individually, an interference task, a free recall phase with keyboard input, and a recognition phase using a conditions file with 'y'/'n' responses. Include a code component to tally and store free-recall and recognition scores, and a final scoring summary screen. Create the recognition conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/ace3_recognition.csv with 12 rows containing columns for the word, 'is_target' flag (1 or 0), and 'correct_response' ('y' or 'n'). Save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ace3_episodic_memory.psyexp. Login: user ga, password password123
